# TriNova Helvetic Group

> TriNova Helvetic Group is the Swiss operating and management company behind premium Swiss Riviera real estate and hospitality. It operates through a partnership of independent, self-employed professionals — combining an on-the-ground Swiss presence on the Riviera with dedicated near-shore capability hubs. Operating on the Swiss Riviera since 2021.

## Who
- Name: TriNova Helvetic Group
- Founder, Partner & Global Managing Director: Réka Raffai (https://www.linkedin.com/in/reka-raffai-270442215/)
- Company LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/trinova-helvetic-group/
- Registered legal entity: TriNova Helvetic Group Kft. (Hungarian limited liability company; registered seat: Udvardi utca 27., 8000 Székesfehérvár, Hungary; company reg. no. Cg. 07-09-036414; EU VAT HU32750625)
- Operating base: Montreux, Lake Geneva Riviera, Vaud, Switzerland
- Website (canonical): https://www.trinovahelveticgroup.ch/
- Contact: info@trinovahelveticgroup.ch

## What
Three divisions, one Swiss standard:
- TriNova Hospitality — short- and medium-term furnished rental, corporate & B2B stays, events, trainings, guest experience & housekeeping.
- TriNova Real Estate & Business Services — property & tenancy management, leasing & re-letting, AP/AR, financial reporting, project management & accounting.
- TriNova AI & Advisory — applied AI & automation, operations & data strategy, digital-first process design, advisory for Swiss & international firms; AI agent design & deployment, website design & deployment, Microsoft 365 / Power Automate workflow automation.

## Operating model
A partnership of independent professionals (sole proprietors), each their own principal under an independent service agreement — not employees. Swiss standards, governance and accountability in Switzerland; delivery through near-shore capability hubs.

## Who it serves
Property owners, financing partners (banks), corporate & private guests, and independent specialists.
